summary: UI Developer with 4 years of hands-on experience building scalable, high-performance web applications across HealthCare, Casino Gaming, and B2B Marketing Automation domains. Proven expertise in React, TypeScript, Redux, and modern JavaScript delivering enterprise-grade solutions with modular architecture, RBAC, REST API integration, and responsive design. Adept at collaborating in Agile teams, mentoring junior developers, and consistently optimizing application performance across complex, cross-domain projects.

experience.title: UI Developer
experience.description: Developed MassEngage Lead Accelerator B2B marketing automation platform
bullets: Led frontend transformation of a scalable B2B SaaS lead generation platform using React 18 with component-based architecture, code splitting with lazy loading, and reusable UI components
Designed a dynamic campaign workflow builder with drag-and-drop graphical visualization, conditional branching, and automated lead scoring rule engine
Executed Role-Based Access Control (RBAC) with React Router protected routes, custom permission hooks, context-based role providers, and role-driven UI element visibility
Built automated lead lifecycle engine: real-time assignment logic, email notifications with Excel attachment reports, and intelligent redistribution for rejected or uncontacted leads
Enhanced configurable lead export (XLSX/PDF) and analytics dashboards displaying funnel metrics, conversion rates, agent performance, and campaign ROI trends
Architected reusable component library (smart tables, controlled forms, multi-step stepper, chart widgets) using Material-UI, reducing feature development time across modules
Utilized Redux Toolkit with async thunks, selectors, and middleware for efficient state management, preventing race conditions and ensuring predictable data flow
Optimized bundle output via code splitting, tree shaking, and Webpack bundle analysis reducing initial load time by ~30%

experience.title: Software Developer
experience.description: Enhanced Healthcare Trial Accelerator Platform for streamlining clinical trial lifecycle management
bullets: Led React 17 frontend development for a multi-module clinical trial SaaS platform, establishing component-based architecture with shared custom hooks and clean module boundaries
Designed and created 30+ reusable React components (data tables, multi-step wizards, dynamic forms, patient cards, timeline trackers) and custom hooks for cross-module use
Collaborated closely with product owners and backend teams to define API contracts, data models, and integration workflows for 20+ RESTful endpoints
Applied Redux store with typed actions, reducers, selectors, and async thunks for centralized state management; employed React.memo and useMemo for performance optimization
Enforced granular RBAC (Admin, Investigator, Monitor, Coordinator) via route guards and conditional rendering; incorporated JWT-based auth with auto token refresh via Axios interceptors
Executed audit trail logging on all data mutations to meet 21 CFR Part 11 and HIPAA electronic records compliance requirements
Worked with QA and DevOps teams on CI/CD pipeline setup (Azure DevOps), test automation with Jest/React Testing Library, and streamlined deployment and bug tracking via Jira

experience.title: Sr. Software Developer
experience.description: Created dynamic and engaging online slot games for a global casino gaming platform (MG Asia)
bullets: Expanded immersive slot game UIs using PixiJS WebGL renderer and HTML5 Canvas API, achieving consistent 60fps gameplay across desktop, tablet, and mobile browsers
Designed fluid reel spin animations with custom easing curves, motion blur during spin, landing bounce physics, and win-line highlight sequences using PixiJS ticker and tweening library
Executed configurable payline engines supporting 5, 10, 20, and 243-ways configurations with dynamic win calculation and visual payline overlay rendering
Built 3-reel and 5-reel game mechanics including wild substitutions, scatter detection, free spin triggers, multiplier stacking, and cascading reel (avalanche) mechanics
Created and merged a progressive jackpot meter with real-time WebSocket-based increment feeds and milestone-triggered jackpot win celebration animations
Constructed bonus round mini-games (pick-a-prize, wheel spin, free spins mode) driven by a finite state machine for predictable, testable game state transitions
Built a real-time leaderboard system and tiered player rewards module with achievement badges, XP level tracking, and loyalty milestone notifications
Streamlined asset pipeline using texture atlases, compressed sprite sheets, and progressive lazy loading, reducing initial game load time by 35%

experience.title: UI Developer
experience.description: Improved MSettu and Nahikalii platforms for Mahindra & Mahindra managing various business processes
bullets: Architected MSettu using React 18 with modern hooks (useState, useEffect, useContext, useReducer) to streamline Mahindra's financial workflows, supply chain operations, and dealer performance reporting pipelines
Applied role-segregated dashboards (Finance, Operations, Admin) with configurable widget layouts and permission-controlled data visibility per user role
Built Nahikalii as a fully responsive React.js application using CSS modules for scoped styling and React hooks for comprehensive state management
Incorporated PixiJS canvas scenes and D3.js chart types (bar, line, donut, heatmap) to render real-time operational KPIs and business intelligence metrics interactively
Connected 10+ REST APIs using Axios with request interceptors for token auth, deduplication, and standardized error boundary handling across both platforms
Enhanced React performance via React.memo, useMemo, useCallback memoization, react-window virtualized lists, and lazy-loaded route-based code splitting
Delivered both platforms within a 3-month Agile engagement using bi-weekly sprints, Jira task tracking, and GitLab merge request workflows with mandatory code review gates

experience.title: SME
experience.description: Expanded a comprehensive Digital Learning platform for enhanced user experiences
bullets: Contributed as SME and frontend developer to a full-scale LMS platform serving 5000+ learners across academic and professional corporate training segments
Merged multi-modal content delivery: HLS video streaming with playback controls, interactive quizzes, graded assignments, downloadable e-books, and live session scheduling with calendar sync
Designed a personalized learning path recommendation engine suggesting courses and resources based on user role, skill gap analysis, progress history, and behavioral engagement signals
Created a module-level and course-level assessment engine supporting MCQ, fill-in-the-blank, and descriptive formats with configurable time limits, attempt restrictions, and automated scoring
Created instructor and learner dashboards with real-time progress rings, streak indicators, XP-based gamification, completion certificate generation, and deadline alerts
Blended a data analytics pipeline tracking video watch duration, quiz scores, module completion rates, and session frequency surfaced in instructor reporting dashboards
Collaborated with subject matter experts to digitize and structure course content into intuitive LMS modules with consistent UX patterns and accessibility compliance

strengths.description: Capable of quick learning and delivering effective solutions in a team setting, with daily stand-ups, peer reviews, and cross-functional Agile collaboration

strengths.title: Problem Solving
strengths.description: Strong analytical approach to breaking down complex UI challenges  from RNG-based game mechanics to HIPAA-compliant healthcare workflows

strengths.title: Adaptability
strengths.description: Quickly ramped up across diverse domains  healthcare, casino gaming, e-learning, e-publishing, and B2B marketing  adopting new tech stacks with each project

strengths.title: Mentoring & Leadership
strengths.description: Conducted code reviews, mentored junior developers, and ensured adherence to coding standards across multiple teams

strengths.title: Performance Optimisation
strengths.description: Applied code splitting, React hooks memoization, modular architecture, and efficient API state handling to build fast, scalable React applications

bullets: Developed user-friendly slot game UIs optimized for cross-platform play across desktop, tablet, and mobile devices
Integrated dynamic reel animations, symbol transitions, and bonus visual effects using PixiJS and HTML5 Canvas
Implemented multiple payline configurations, 3-reel/5-reel mechanics, wilds, scatters, free spins, and multipliers
Engineered progressive jackpot mechanics and bonus round triggers with smooth state transitions
Built real-time leaderboards and a player rewards system featuring in-game achievements and loyalty tracking
